title: C++ compile errors: operands to ‘?:’ have different types, base operand of ‘->’ is not a pointer, etc.

features.name: queue of class handles indexed dynamically
features.description: Code should include a queue of class handles (typedef with [$]) declared as a dynamic array indexed by a variable derived from a foreach loop over an enum array

features.name: queue size method call in ternary expression
features.description: Code should include a queue size() method call where the queue reference is the result of a ternary operator with mismatched branch types (queue vs scalar)

features.name: class with rand members used in queue
features.description: Code should include a class with randomizable members used as queue element type, where objects are created dynamically and pushed into queues indexed by enum-derived indices
